TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-election_lahi_ a taro_ babay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: o baki' So'o mwai' ila hini' kala minayti' koza ila kin honaehnge.
S.PHON: o βakiʔ ʃoʔo mwaiʔ ila hiniʔ kala minajtiʔ koz~ða ila kin honæhŋə.
S.FORM: o baki' So'o mwai' ila hini' kala minayti' koza ila kin honaehnge.
S.PHON: o βakiʔ ʃoʔo mwaiʔ ila hiniʔ kala minajtiʔ koz~ða ila kin honæhŋə.
S.TRANSL: 先生,你來他們這兒已經多久了?
Sir, how long have you been here?

S.FORM: yo mwai' rini' 'am SayboSi 'ilaS sizaeh.
S.PHON: jo mwaiʔ riniʔ ʔam ʃajβoʃi ʔilaʃ s~θiz~ðæh.
S.FORM: yo mwai' rini' 'am SayboSi 'ilaS sizaeh.
S.PHON: jo mwaiʔ riniʔ ʔam ʃajβoʃi ʔilaʃ s~θiz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 唷,我來這裡已經有六個月了.
I've been here six months already.

S.FORM: a SayboSi 'ilas ma hoenaehnge ila ka 'am samsah ila.
S.PHON: a ʃajβoʃi ʔilas~θ ma hœnæhŋə ila ka ʔam s~θams~θah ila.
S.FORM: a SayboSi 'ilas ma hoenaehnge ila ka 'am samsah ila.
S.PHON: a ʃajβoʃi ʔilas~θ ma hœnæhŋə ila ka ʔam s~θams~θah ila.
S.TRANSL: 啊,六個月喔,也滿久了.
Ah, six months already. It's been a long time.

S.FORM: a mwai' hini kala minayti' niSo' kano' patawawen.
S.PHON: a mwaiʔ hini kala minajtiʔ niʃoʔ kanoʔ patawawən.
S.FORM: a mwai' hini kala minayti' niSo' kano' patawawen.
S.PHON: a mwaiʔ hini kala minajtiʔ niʃoʔ kanoʔ patawawən.
S.TRANSL: 那=你來他們這裡,你做什麼事啊?
What do you do here?

S.FORM: o matawaw maelahaeng ka span ka wa'ae' tabo sapeh o ma' 'ima kikoso'.
S.PHON: o matawaw mælahæŋ ka s~θpan ka waʔæʔ taβo s~θapəh o maʔ ʔima kikos~θoʔ.
S.FORM: o matawaw maelahaeng ka span ka wa'ae' tabo sapeh o ma' 'ima kikoso'.
S.PHON: o matawaw mælahæŋ ka s~θpan ka waʔæʔ taβo s~θapəh o maʔ ʔima kikos~θoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 喔,我照顧養的鹿啊,餵它們吃東西啊,打掃啊,喔還有,除草啊.
I feed the deer, sweep the place, and do the weeding too.

S.FORM: a koza' kasinpanan kin 'akoy.
S.PHON: a koz~ðaʔ kas~θinpanan kin ʔakoj.
S.FORM: a koza' kasinpanan kin 'akoy.
S.PHON: a koz~ðaʔ kas~θinpanan kin ʔakoj.
S.TRANSL: 啊,那你們養很多嗎?
How many do you raise?

S.FORM: sinpanan kinaroSa'an e matool.
S.PHON: s~θinpanan kinaroʃaʔan ə matool.
S.FORM: sinpanan kinaroSa'an e matool.
S.PHON: s~θinpanan kinaroʃaʔan ə matool.
S.TRANSL: 養在兩個地方,總共有三十隻.
They are kept in two places, thirty in all.

S.FORM: matool e piza' sinraehoe' hiza koSa'en ka wa'ae'.
S.PHON: matool ə piz~ðaʔ s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ða koʃaʔən ka waʔæʔ.
S.FORM: matool e piza' sinraehoe' hiza koSa'en ka wa'ae'.
S.PHON: matool ə piz~ðaʔ s~θinræhœʔ hiz~ða koʃaʔən ka waʔæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 三十喔.那鹿總共有幾種啊?
How many species are there?

S.FORM: too' sinraehoe' too' sinraehoe' 'aehae' koSa'en kasakiray bangol ka wa'ae'.
S.PHON: tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən kas~θakiraj βaŋol ka waʔæʔ.
S.FORM: too' sinraehoe' too' sinraehoe' 'aehae' koSa'en kasakiray bangol ka wa'ae'.
S.PHON: tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ tooʔ s~θinræhœʔ ʔæhæʔ koʃaʔən kas~θakiraj βaŋol ka waʔæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 喔三個,三個種類.一種是野鹿.
Three. One is wild.

S.FORM: e 'aehae' naehaen sinkano'on.
S.PHON: ə ʔæhæʔ næhæn s~θinkanoʔon.
S.FORM: e 'aehae' naehaen sinkano'on.
S.PHON: ə ʔæhæʔ næhæn s~θinkanoʔon.
S.TRANSL: 另外一種是叫做什麼來的.
There is one more wachamaccalit.

S.FORM: 'ihi' mita' noka SaiSiyat yao kik sekela o koSa'en inak'inoan wa'a'.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ mitaʔ noka ʃaiʃijat jao kik s~θəkəla o koʃaʔən inakʔinoan waʔaʔ.
S.FORM: 'ihi' mita' noka SaiSiyat yao kik sekela o koSa'en inak'inoan wa'a'.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ mitaʔ noka ʃaiʃijat jao kik s~θəkəla o koʃaʔən inakʔinoan waʔaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 喔,我們賽夏人不知道怎麼叫那種鹿.
We don't know how to call it.

S.FORM: ah noka 'inaray roSa' sinraehoe 'inaray babih.
S.PHON: ah noka ʔinaraj roʃaʔ s~θinræhœ ʔinaraj βaβih.
S.FORM: ah noka 'inaray roSa' sinraehoe 'inaray babih.
S.PHON: ah noka ʔinaraj roʃaʔ s~θinræhœ ʔinaraj βaβih.
S.TRANSL: 另外兩個種類是來自別的地方.
Two species are from other places.

S.FORM: ah inaray kabih no(ka) wasal.
S.PHON: ah inaraj kaβih no(ka) was~θal.
S.FORM: ah inaray kabih no(ka) wasal.
S.PHON: ah inaraj kaβih no(ka) was~θal.
S.TRANSL: 啊,是從國外來的.
Ah, from overseas.

S.FORM: ai hiza ra 'a wa'ae' 'aehae' sinraehoe koSa'en kasikiray bangol.
S.PHON: ai hiz~ða ra ʔa waʔæʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœ koʃaʔən kas~θikiraj βaŋol.
S.FORM: ai hiza ra 'a wa'ae' 'aehae' sinraehoe koSa'en kasikiray bangol.
S.PHON: ai hiz~ða ra ʔa waʔæʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœ koʃaʔən kas~θikiraj βaŋol.
S.TRANSL: 是的,那一種鹿是野鹿.
Right. That is wild deer.

S.FORM: e 'aehae' sinraehoe' mita' ma' 'oka' ka kapnabih ila.
S.PHON: ə ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ mitaʔ maʔ ʔokaʔ ka kapnaβih ila.
S.FORM: e 'aehae' sinraehoe' mita' ma' 'oka' ka kapnabih ila.
S.PHON: ə ʔæhæʔ s~θinræhœʔ mitaʔ maʔ ʔokaʔ ka kapnaβih ila.
S.TRANSL: 這種鹿我們沒有名稱.
This species we do not have a name for it.

S.FORM: mita' ma' koSa wa'ae' wa'ae' saboeh sinraehoe' 'oka' ila o.
S.PHON: mitaʔ maʔ koʃa waʔæʔ waʔæʔ s~θaβœh s~θinræhœʔ ʔokaʔ ila o.
S.FORM: mita' ma' koSa wa'ae' wa'ae' saboeh sinraehoe' 'oka' ila o.
S.PHON: mitaʔ maʔ koʃa waʔæʔ waʔæʔ s~θaβœh s~θinræhœʔ ʔokaʔ ila o.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有名稱,我們都叫做鹿.
We do not have names. We call all of them deer. No names.

S.FORM: isaa 'aehae' may'isaa rpa nakhini oSa'en.
S.PHON: is~θaa ʔæhæʔ majʔis~θaa rpa nakhini oʃaʔən.
S.FORM: isaa 'aehae' may'isaa rpa nakhini oSa'en.
S.PHON: is~θaa ʔæhæʔ majʔis~θaa rpa nakhini oʃaʔən.
S.TRANSL: 那一隻經過那裡就加入那一群的.
That one passed by there and joined the herd.

S.FORM: kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae' hinghae' ila ki yabaka'.
S.PHON: kama laŋoj raj ralom waʔæʔ hiŋhæʔ ila ki jaβakaʔ.
S.FORM: kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae' hinghae' ila ki yabaka'.
S.PHON: kama laŋoj raj ralom waʔæʔ hiŋhæʔ ila ki jaβakaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那種鹿會游泳,像水牛一樣.
This kind of deer swims, like cows.

S.FORM: o bazae'en ila komoSa' kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae'.
S.PHON: o βaz~ðæʔən ila komoʃaʔ kama laŋoj raj ralom waʔæʔ.
S.FORM: o bazae'en ila komoSa' kama langoy ray ralom wa'ae'.
S.PHON: o βaz~ðæʔən ila komoʃaʔ kama laŋoj raj ralom waʔæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 聽說,會游泳的鹿,
It's heard that the swimming deer.

S.FORM: o hiwa'en ka kaeh'oen.
S.PHON: o hiwaʔən ka kæhʔœn.
S.FORM: o hiwa'en ka kaeh'oen.
S.PHON: o hiwaʔən ka kæhʔœn.
S.TRANSL: 如果鋸掉牠的角,
the horn is sawed off,

S.FORM: so sengeen noka pinobaeah.
S.PHON: s~θo s~θəŋəən noka pinoβæah.
S.FORM: so sengeen noka pinobaeah.
S.PHON: s~θo s~θəŋəən noka pinoβæah.
S.TRANSL: 然後如果泡在酒裡,
soaked in wine,

S.FORM: o pa'oSa'en ka 'iyo'.
S.PHON: o paʔoʃaʔən ka ʔijoʔ.
S.FORM: o pa'oSa'en ka 'iyo'.
S.PHON: o paʔoʃaʔən ka ʔijoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 加一些藥,
medicine added,

S.FORM: he ra'oeoen noka mae'iyaeh komoSa isaza 'am hinghae'en soiti'.
S.PHON: hə raʔœœn noka mæʔijæh komoʃa is~θaz~ða ʔam hiŋhæʔən s~θoitiʔ.
S.FORM: he ra'oeoen noka mae'iyaeh komoSa isaza 'am hinghae'en soiti'.
S.PHON: hə raʔœœn noka mæʔijæh komoʃa is~θaz~ða ʔam hiŋhæʔən s~θoitiʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (但是)要喝少量(一半以上就可以).

S.TRANSL: 要喝少量 .

TRANSL.notes: One should drink moderately (a bit more than a half).

S.TRANSL: One should drink moderately .

S.FORM: kayzaeh okik rikrika.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh okik rikrika.
S.FORM: kayzaeh okik rikrika.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh okik rikrika.
S.TRANSL: 以免身體發燒.
to avoid heating up.

S.FORM: o 'aehae' naehaen koSa'en kasikiray a kokool ka wa'ae' nakhara ra'oeen koSa' 'am rikrika.
S.PHON: o ʔæhæʔ næhæn koʃaʔən kas~θikiraj a kokool ka waʔæʔ nakhara raʔœən koʃaʔ ʔam rikrika.
S.FORM: o 'aehae' naehaen koSa'en kasikiray a kokool ka wa'ae' nakhara ra'oeen koSa' 'am rikrika.
S.PHON: o ʔæhæʔ næhæn koʃaʔən kas~θikiraj a kokool ka waʔæʔ nakhara raʔœən koʃaʔ ʔam rikrika.
S.TRANSL: 有另外一種山鹿,那種酒喝了更熱.

TRANSL.notes: Another kind of wild deer, it's hotter if you drink (that).

S.TRANSL: Another kind of wild deer, it's hotter if you drink .

S.FORM: o 'aehae' naehaen sinraehoe' isaa yao ma' aw 'oka' ila sekela' atomalan isaa 'aehae' naehaen ka sinraehoe.
S.PHON: o ʔæhæʔ næhæn s~θinræhœʔ is~θaa jao maʔ aw ʔokaʔ ila s~θəkəlaʔ atomalan is~θaa ʔæhæʔ næhæn ka s~θinræhœ.
S.FORM: o 'aehae' naehaen sinraehoe' isaa yao ma' aw 'oka' ila sekela' atomalan isaa 'aehae' naehaen ka sinraehoe.
S.PHON: o ʔæhæʔ næhæn s~θinræhœʔ is~θaa jao maʔ aw ʔokaʔ ila s~θəkəlaʔ atomalan is~θaa ʔæhæʔ næhæn ka s~θinræhœ.
S.TRANSL: 有另外一種鹿我不太熟悉,
Another kind of deer I'm really not familiar with

S.FORM: hinghae' saboeh wa'ae' koSa'en ka kaeh'oen mariin So.
S.PHON: hiŋhæʔ s~θaβœh waʔæʔ koʃaʔən ka kæhʔœn mariin ʃo.
S.FORM: hinghae' saboeh wa'ae' koSa'en ka kaeh'oen mariin So.
S.PHON: hiŋhæʔ s~θaβœh waʔæʔ koʃaʔən ka kæhʔœn mariin ʃo.
S.TRANSL: 跟其他種鹿一樣,鋸掉牠的角,
Like all the other deer, the horn is taken,

S.FORM: pinobaeaeh ila ka pino pinobaeaeh ki 'iyo' ila hiza kita' ila ka 'iyo' mita' hamez.
S.PHON: pinoβææh ila ka pino pinoβææh ki ʔijoʔ ila hiz~ða kitaʔ ila ka ʔijoʔ mitaʔ haməz~ð.
S.FORM: pinobaeaeh ila ka pino pinobaeaeh ki 'iyo' ila hiza kita' ila ka 'iyo' mita' hamez.
S.PHON: pinoβææh ila ka pino pinoβææh ki ʔijoʔ ila hiz~ða kitaʔ ila ka ʔijoʔ mitaʔ haməz~ð.
S.TRANSL: 泡在酒裡,然後加一些藥,
Then soaked in wine and mixed with medicine.

S.FORM: ka ki kita' ka mae'iyaeh noka tatini' kasi'aelen a ka korkoring kasi'aelen ka minkoringan kasi'aelen o 'iyo' hamez okik hinghae'.
S.PHON: ka ki kitaʔ ka mæʔijæh noka tatiniʔ kas~θiʔælən a ka korkoriŋ kas~θiʔælən ka minkoriŋan kas~θiʔælən o ʔijoʔ haməz~ð okik hiŋhæʔ.
S.FORM: ka ki kita' ka mae'iyaeh noka tatini' kasi'aelen a ka korkoring kasi'aelen ka minkoringan kasi'aelen o 'iyo' hamez okik hinghae'.
S.PHON: ka ki kitaʔ ka mæʔijæh noka tatiniʔ kas~θiʔælən a ka korkoriŋ kas~θiʔælən ka minkoriŋan kas~θiʔælən o ʔijoʔ haməz~ð okik hiŋhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老人小孩可以吃,但婦女喝的藥不太一樣.
It can be taken by old people and by children. But the medicine added into women's drink is not the same.

S.FORM: ah so noka hiza ka kamanraan mita' pakwa'isan ka basang mita'.
S.PHON: ah s~θo noka hiz~ða ka kamanraan mitaʔ pakwaʔis~θan ka βas~θaŋ mitaʔ.
S.FORM: ah so noka hiza ka kamanraan mita' pakwa'isan ka basang mita'.
S.PHON: ah s~θo noka hiz~ða ka kamanraan mitaʔ pakwaʔis~θan ka βas~θaŋ mitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 男性喝的藥可以使身體強壯.
The medicine mixed in men's drinks was supposed to make the body strong.

S.FORM: mita' ma 'okik hinghae' ka 'iyo' ka pa'oSa' hamez nak'isaza.
S.PHON: mitaʔ ma ʔokik hiŋhæʔ ka ʔijoʔ ka paʔoʃaʔ haməz~ð nakʔis~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: mita' ma 'okik hinghae' ka 'iyo' ka pa'oSa' hamez nak'isaza.
S.PHON: mitaʔ ma ʔokik hiŋhæʔ ka ʔijoʔ ka paʔoʃaʔ haməz~ð nakʔis~θaz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 那種飲料放的藥物不同.
The medicine mixed in that drink is not the same.

S.FORM: ay hayza' paskilkilo' ila hani.
S.PHON: aj hajz~ðaʔ pas~θkilkiloʔ ila hani.
S.FORM: ay hayza' paskilkilo' ila hani.
S.PHON: aj hajz~ðaʔ pas~θkilkiloʔ ila hani.
S.TRANSL: 啊,有一隻生了.
There's one that gave birth.

S.FORM: 'aehae' ila kahiya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ila kahijaʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehae' ila kahiya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ila kahijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 一隻,昨天生的.
One. Yesterday.

S.FORM: ay paskilkilo' paskilkilo' ila ka a koSa'en SayboSi ila ila sinpanan ma isa ila paskilkilo' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: aj pas~θkilkiloʔ pas~θkilkiloʔ ila ka a koʃaʔən ʃajβoʃi ila ila s~θinpanan ma is~θa ila pas~θkilkiloʔ ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: ay paskilkilo' paskilkilo' ila ka a koSa'en SayboSi ila ila sinpanan ma isa ila paskilkilo' 'aehae'.
S.PHON: aj pas~θkilkiloʔ pas~θkilkiloʔ ila ka a koʃaʔən ʃajβoʃi ila ila s~θinpanan ma is~θa ila pas~θkilkiloʔ ʔæhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻生了,總共有六隻了.
One gave birth to six cubs yesterday.

S.FORM: 'ihi' ay hiza ma' isaa kay kayzaeh atomalan koSa'en rpa ila.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ aj hiz~ða maʔ is~θaa kaj kajz~ðæh atomalan koʃaʔən rpa ila.
S.FORM: 'ihi' ay hiza ma' isaa kay kayzaeh atomalan koSa'en rpa ila.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ aj hiz~ða maʔ is~θaa kaj kajz~ðæh atomalan koʃaʔən rpa ila.
S.TRANSL: 若加一點藥材就很好.

TRANSL.notes: It would be good to add (something).

S.TRANSL: It would be good to add .

S.FORM: e rpa' ila ka wa'is o.
S.PHON: ə rpaʔ ila ka waʔis~θ o.
S.FORM: e rpa' ila ka wa'is o.
S.PHON: ə rpaʔ ila ka waʔis~θ o.
S.TRANSL: 是啊,會讓你更強壯.
Yes, it would make you stronger.

S.FORM: 'ihi' masaso' ka nisia manakwa ila.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ mas~θas~θoʔ ka nis~θia manakwa ila.
S.FORM: 'ihi' masaso' ka nisia manakwa ila.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ mas~θas~θoʔ ka nis~θia manakwa ila.
S.TRANSL: 他說什麼?
What did he say?

S.FORM: hini 'am koSa' mita'.
S.PHON: hini ʔam koʃaʔ mitaʔ.
S.FORM: hini 'am koSa' mita'.
S.PHON: hini ʔam koʃaʔ mitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這是我們要講的.

TRANSL.notes: This is what we (need to) talk about

S.TRANSL: This is what we talk about

S.FORM: a min'itol nak hini koSa'en ka ka kinashoeroe'an ka howaw.
S.PHON: a minʔitol nak hini koʃaʔən ka ka kinas~θhœrœʔan ka howaw.
S.FORM: a min'itol nak hini koSa'en ka ka kinashoeroe'an ka howaw.
S.PHON: a minʔitol nak hini koʃaʔən ka ka kinas~θhœrœʔan ka howaw.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣參選就是要找公職.

TRANSL.notes: Running for elections is discovering (public) service.

S.TRANSL: Running for elections is discovering service.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ay nakhini'an sipanabih taiwan.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh aj nakhiniʔan s~θipanaβih taiwan.
S.FORM: kayzaeh ay nakhini'an sipanabih taiwan.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh aj nakhiniʔan s~θipanaβih taiwan.
S.TRANSL: 在台灣講這個話題行嗎?
Is it all right to talk about this in Taiwan?

S.FORM: nakhini'an sipnabih nakhara 'oka' ka howaw mina.
S.PHON: nakhiniʔan s~θipnaβih nakhara ʔokaʔ ka howaw mina.
S.FORM: nakhini'an sipnabih nakhara 'oka' ka howaw mina.
S.PHON: nakhiniʔan s~θipnaβih nakhara ʔokaʔ ka howaw mina.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣的 ... ... 沒什麼意思.
There is really nothing meaningful with elections like this.

S.FORM: hini kano' atomal ila nakhini'an o.
S.PHON: hini kanoʔ atomal ila nakhiniʔan o.
S.FORM: hini kano' atomal ila nakhini'an o.
S.PHON: hini kanoʔ atomal ila nakhiniʔan o.
S.TRANSL: It really is. For what is this thing?

S.FORM: 'oka' ka howaw.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ka howaw.
S.FORM: 'oka' ka howaw.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ka howaw.
S.TRANSL: 沒什麼意思.
Nothing .

S.FORM: mita' howaw 'ita' kasikiray 'os'osoan o hita' hayza' ka wa'is nom maehraehraeng ka 'inakhiza.
S.PHON: mitaʔ howaw ʔitaʔ kas~θikiraj ʔos~θʔos~θoan o hitaʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka waʔis~θ nom mæhræhræŋ ka ʔinakhiz~ða.
S.FORM: mita' howaw 'ita' kasikiray 'os'osoan o hita' hayza' ka wa'is nom maehraehraeng ka 'inakhiza.
S.PHON: mitaʔ howaw ʔitaʔ kas~θikiraj ʔos~θʔos~θoan o hitaʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka waʔis~θ nom mæhræhræŋ ka ʔinakhiz~ða.

TRANSL.notes: 我們在山上作農夫的,(沒)資格講這些話題.

S.TRANSL: 我們在山上作農夫的, 資格講這些話題.

TRANSL.notes: As farmers living in the mountains, we (don't) have the capability to discuss with them things like that.

S.TRANSL: As farmers living in the mountains, we have the capability to discuss with them things like that.

S.FORM: na wa'is o nakhini hini koSa'en ila min'itol ka ka patahoeki'in.
S.PHON: na waʔis~θ o nakhini hini koʃaʔən ila minʔitol ka ka patahœkiʔin.
S.FORM: na wa'is o nakhini hini koSa'en ila min'itol ka ka patahoeki'in.
S.PHON: na waʔis~θ o nakhini hini koʃaʔən ila minʔitol ka ka patahœkiʔin.
S.TRANSL: 像這樣的人有能力登記參選民代.

TRANSL.notes: (People like this) have the ability to run for office.

S.TRANSL: have the ability to run for office.

S.FORM: 'a'aringan kakhayza'an mita' koSa'en noka tatini' tabin haysani.
S.PHON: ʔaʔariŋan kakhajz~ðaʔan mitaʔ koʃaʔən noka tatiniʔ taβin hajs~θani.
S.FORM: 'a'aringan kakhayza'an mita' koSa'en noka tatini' tabin haysani.
S.PHON: ʔaʔariŋan kakhajz~ðaʔan mitaʔ koʃaʔən noka tatiniʔ taβin hajs~θani.
S.TRANSL: 我們老人家從以前到現在對選舉一直沒什麼問題.
Since the past until now, we old people have never had any problem with elections.

S.FORM: 'ana min'itol hia' kita' makakreng no matawaw min'itol mita' ma' kaela'haengen.
S.PHON: ʔana minʔitol hiaʔ kitaʔ makakrəŋ no matawaw minʔitol mitaʔ maʔ kælaʔhæŋən.
S.FORM: 'ana min'itol hia' kita' makakreng no matawaw min'itol mita' ma' kaela'haengen.
S.PHON: ʔana minʔitol hiaʔ kitaʔ makakrəŋ no matawaw minʔitol mitaʔ maʔ kælaʔhæŋən.
S.TRANSL: 無論誰參選,只要認真做事,我們都會支持.
Whoever is elected, as long as they work diligently, we will also support him."

S.FORM: 'oka'ila o haysani raamen ila nakhini koSa'en kil moto.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔila o hajs~θani raamən ila nakhini koʃaʔən kil moto.
S.FORM: 'oka'ila o haysani raamen ila nakhini koSa'en kil moto.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔila o hajs~θani raamən ila nakhini koʃaʔən kil moto.
S.TRANSL: 現在我們都知道登記參選的人都要跟客家人競爭.
Now we know that whoever runs will have to compete with Hakka candidates."

S.FORM: So min'itol ma' noka a moto nasia money(ita'.
S.PHON: ʃo minʔitol maʔ noka a moto nas~θia monəj(itaʔ.
S.FORM: So min'itol ma' noka a moto nasia money(ita'.
S.PHON: ʃo minʔitol maʔ noka a moto nas~θia monəj(itaʔ.
S.TRANSL: (目前缺漏)
(It is missing presently)
